# Generated by Forge — do not edit manually

# cursor-hackaton

Generated with [Forge](https://github.com/infinity/forge).

## Apps

| Path | Type | Port | Guide |
|------|------|------|-------|
| `web/` | web | 3001 | [Guide](./web/README.md) |

Each app has its own dependencies and `node_modules`. See each app README for setup instructions.

## Requirements

- Node.js 20 or later
- pnpm (recommended package manager)
- Docker and Docker Compose (for Postgres, Redis, and Mailpit in development)

Forge stores installed apps and modules in `.forge/manifest.json`. This file is the source of truth for generated Docker Compose files and documentation.

## Docker

Infrastructure services included in `docker-compose.dev.yml`:

- postgres
- mailpit

Start infrastructure only:

```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up postgres mailpit -d
```

Start all apps (development):

```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
```

Production:

```bash
docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build -d
```

Regenerate documentation after editing the manifest:

```bash
forge docs
```
